{{CargoRelic
|name=Eiffel Tower Blueprints
|class_id=21037
|rank=SSS
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=A radical fusion of industrial mathematics and Art Nouveau audacity, these 1889 drawings birthed Paris’ iron icon. Gustave Eiffel’s team defied gravity (and critics) with 18,038 interlocking parts—transforming steel into a lattice of pure ambition. More than construction plans, they became the DNA of steampunk fantasy, their geometric poetry still shaping skylines from Vegas to anime cities.
|fame=107
|art=54
|fth=57
|civ=69
|tech=75
|ss1=Snail Leadership +3<br>Per tier up for Epochbough, Snail HP + 60<br>Per tier up for Epochbough, Snail Murky Power + 6<br>Epochbough: T30/30
|ss2=Snail Leadership +4<br>Per tier up for Epochbough, Snail HP + 80<br>Per tier up for Epochbough, Snail Murky Power + 8<br>Epochbough: T30/30
|ss3=Snail Leadership +5<br>Per tier up for Epochbough, Snail HP + 100<br>Per tier up for Epochbough, Snail Murky Power + 10<br>Epochbough: T30/30
|ss4=Snail Leadership +7<br>Per tier up for Epochbough, Snail HP + 140<br>Per tier up for Epochbough, Snail Murky Power + 14<br>Epochbough: T30/30
|ss5=Snail Leadership +9<br>Per tier up for Epochbough, Snail HP + 180<br>Per tier up for Epochbough, Snail Murky Power + 18<br>Epochbough: T30/30
|ss6=Snail Leadership +12<br>Per tier up for Epochbough, Snail HP + 240<br>Per tier up for Epochbough, Snail Murky Power + 24<br>Epochbough: T30/30
|ss7=Snail Leadership +12<br>Per tier up for Epochbough, Snail HP + 240<br>Per tier up for Epochbough, Snail Murky Power + 24<br>Epochbough: T30/30<br>Snail Leadership +5 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Murkyglen skill III.png|50px]]Placed in Murky Glen:Murky Glen, Wish Coin output speed+30%
|skill2=[[File:Murkyglen skill III.png|50px]]Placed in Murky Glen:Murky Glen, Relic FAME +15
|skill3=[[File:Murkyglen skill III.png|50px]]Placed in Murky Glen:Murky Glen, Zone SUP effect reduced by 30%
}}
